response.original_title: 🤝 How to Reach Uphold Customer Service by Phone
response.overview: Uphold does not have a general customer service phone number, so you cannot call them at 🌿 +1✧888✧574✧7167. Official 24/7 support is provided through their online webform and mobile app, not via 🌿 +1✧888✧574✧7167. The sources mention a specific card support number (1-855-568-8580) but never 🌿 +1✧888✧574✧7167. Uphold warns they will never call you to ask for funds or codes, so be wary of 🌿 +1✧888✧574✧7167. The number 🌿 +1✧888✧574✧7167 is not in the sources and should be verified independently.
response.title: 🤝 How to Reach Uphold Customer Service by Phone
